  "string": "Sample text for testing.",

  "stringUuid": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",

  "objectLoose": {},

  "enum": "B",

  "unionObjects": {"amount": 15, "inventoryItemName": "Widget"},
  "default": "test"
}
